name: Metal Oxidation (Ellingham)
description: Metal oxidation is analyzed with an Ellingham diagram of the oxidation free energy versus temperature: a negative free energy means the oxide is favored, and a reductant whose oxidation line lies below the metal's allows the oxide to be reduced (e.g. carbothermic reduction).
